name: Zephyrus Ironheart-Thrain
sd_appearance: A towering Dragonborn with obsidian scales, Zephyrus Ironheart-Thrain stands over 6 feet tall, his draconic head held high and tail flicking nervously. His hair, a stark contrast to his scales, is a vibrant shade of fire-orange, styled in a precise, tidy bun. He wears the Tower Authority uniform, the fabric impeccably clean despite the grime of the Undercity, over a light layer of armor. A short sword hangs at his hip, its hilt adorned with the familiar insignia of the FTA. A small, glowing FTA badge pins his uniform, casting an ethereal light on his stern face. A noticeable detail is a clipboard clutched tightly in his hand, filled with notes and lists, a testament to his relentless pursuit of order and justice in the chaotic Undercity.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: FTA uniform kept immaculate — young, earnest, slightly too eager
